data.title: Phoenix Tailings secures $40.2M to boost US rare earth metals production, with total Series B funding at $116.6M.
data.description: Phoenix Tailings, based in Exeter, New Hampshire, has successfully completed a $40.2 million oversubscribed B-3 amplification round, boosting its total Series B funding to $116.6 million. This latest round was made available solely to current investors and specific strategic partners, with $30.2 million in equity and $10 million in venture debt from Nomura. The funding will support Phoenix Tailings in diversifying its offerings beyond neodymium-praseodymium (NdPr), dysprosium (Dy), and terbium production.

data.title: Jack in the Box introduces nationwide matcha beverage lineup, one of the first QSRs in the U.S. to do so. #cravings.
data.description: In San Diego, Jack in the Box (NASDAQ: JACK) has introduced a nationwide lineup of matcha beverages, making it one of the earliest quick-service restaurants (QSRs) in the U.S. to offer matcha drinks. The popular burger chain, also recognized for its tacos, is known for its innovative approach. The addition of matcha to their menu provides customers with an everyday option. This move highlights Jack in the Box's commitment to standing out in the industry.

data.title: Team Cymru supports INTERPOL's Operation Red Card 2.0, targeting cyber crime from Dec 8, 2025 to Jan 30, 2026 globally.
data.description: A company based in Lake Mary, Florida, known as Team Cymru, has revealed its contribution of vital internet intelligence for INTERPOL's Operation Red Card 2.0. This operation, which took place from December 8, 2025, to January 30, 2026, aimed to combat cyber-related criminal activities occurring across various regions. Specifically focusing on high-yield investment scams, mobile money fraud, and deceptive mobile loan applications, Operation Red Card 2.0 targeted both the infrastructure and individuals involved in these illicit activities. Over the course of the eight-week operation, thorough investigations were conducted.

data.title: Hampton by Hilton New Smyrna Beach renovates 112-room hotel on Flagler Avenue, enhancing guestrooms and public spaces.
data.description: A hotel in New Smyrna Beach, Florida, known as the Hampton by Hilton on Flagler Avenue, recently finished a full renovation of its 112-room property. The extensive refurbishment included upgrades to guestrooms and public areas. The renovation project aimed to enhance the overall guest experience and maintain the historic charm of the property. The completion date of the renovation was February 19, 2026.

data.title: Colony Display Manufacturing names Michael Sullivan as new CEO, replacing Shawn Kahler. Sullivan to lead growth strategy.
data.description: In Bartlett, Illinois, Colony Display Manufacturing, LLC has appointed Michael Sullivan as the new Chief Executive Officer, replacing Shawn Kahler. The company specializes in creating custom fixtures and consumer environments to enhance brand identity. Sullivan's appointment comes as part of the company's strategic growth plans, as recognized by the Board of Directors. Sullivan's extensive experience made him the ideal candidate to lead Colony Display Manufacturing, LLC into its next chapter.

data.title: XTM reports service outage due to compliance order, linked with Everyday People Financial Corp, on January 26, 2026.
data.description: In Toronto, XTM Inc. (OTCQB: XTMIF | CSE: PAID) has issued a statement regarding a platform service outage on January 26, 2026, in relation to their Management Services Agreement (MSA) with Everyday People Financial Corp. The MSA was first disclosed on October 22, 2025, with subsequent mentions on February 2, 2026, and February 5, 2026. As part of the MSA, the Company finalized a blocked account agreement on November 3.

data.title: BigTime Software appoints Jerry Cosmas as new CFO, marking growth phase. Leading provider of AI-powered PSA software.
data.description: BigTime Software, a top company specializing in AI-fueled professional services automation software, has recently appointed Jerry Cosmas as their latest Chief Financial Officer on February 19, 2026. Cosmas will be responsible for managing the financial operations of BigTime Software.

data.title: Reese's alters recipes due to cocoa costs. Grandson of founder criticizes changes in some treats, feeling "embarrassed." #chocolate #candy
data.description: Due to the increased cocoa prices, Hershey’s has decided to modify certain candy recipes. The grandson of the individual credited with creating the original Peanut Butter Cup expressed feeling ashamed of the alterations.

data.title: GitHub updates Projects with search query imports and enhanced hierarchy view: inline sub-issue creation, drag-and-drop reordering.
data.description: GitHub Projects has rolled out new features, including search query imports and an improved hierarchy view. Users can now create sub-issues inline and reorder items via drag-and-drop. These enhancements aim to facilitate project organization on the platform.

data.title: Kentucky First Federal Bancorp terminates OCC agreement with First Federal Savings Bank of Kentucky.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Kentucky First Federal Bancorp, which is under the Nasdaq ticker KFFB and operates First Federal Savings and Loan Association in Hazard and First Federal Savings Bank in Frankfort, Kentucky, revealed that the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has officially ended a formal written agreement with First Federal Savings Bank of Kentucky. The terminated agreement, dated August 13, 2024, was overseen by OCC, the primary regulator of the mentioned bank.

data.title: Packaging distribution market aligned with growth trends - report by BGL indicates positive trajectory for sector.
data.description: A recent report by Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL) states that packaging distributors are effectively capitalizing on the significant growth trends within the sector. Released in Chicago on February 19, 2026, the report underscores the alignment of distributors with key industry advancements. It highlights the lucrative opportunities present in the market and emphasizes the strategic positioning of distributors. With BGL's expertise in investment banking, the report sheds light on the positive outlook for packaging distributors, indicating a promising future for the sector.

data.title: Male birth control options in phase II trials offer non-hormonal methods for men beyond condoms and vasectomy.
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 19, 2026, it was reported that there is a growing demand among men for alternative contraceptive methods beyond condoms and vasectomies. The focus is on non-hormonal options, with particular interest in long-acting reversible methods and short-term, on-demand solutions. NEXT Life...

data.title: Auction Direct USA in Raleigh offers advanced tools to find rare used cars easily, enhancing availability for buyers.
data.description: Auction Direct USA in Raleigh, North Carolina, announced on February 19, 2026, that shoppers can now easily discover rare used cars through their platform. By merging a wide selection of pre-owned vehicles with intuitive online search features, the dealership is simplifying the process for customers. This initiative aims to connect buyers with unique automotive options.

data.title: Meritage Homes raises quarterly cash dividend by 12% to $0.48/share, payable on March 31, 2026 to shareholders.
data.description: Scottsdale, Arizona - On February 19, 2026, Meritage Homes Corporation, identified as MTH on the NYSE and the fifth-largest homebuilder in the United States, declared a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share. This marks a significant 12% boost from the $0.43 per share dividend paid out in 2025. Shareholders as of the market close on March 17, 2026, will receive this dividend on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin's Bollinger Bands narrowing signal potential for a significant price swing, direction TBD.
data.description: Analysts note that the Bollinger Bands indicator has reached its narrowest level ever recorded. This unusual technical pattern is seen as an indication of an imminent significant price movement in a particular direction.
